message.content:
Let me apply the correct implementations:

{
  "analysis": "My 'fix' was wrong. I need to implement LE MIPS lwl/lwr/swl/swr correctly according to the MIPS32 spec.",
  "plan": "Fix all four unaligned load/store instructions with correct LE MIPS semantics.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 << 'PYEOF'
with open('/app/vm.js', 'r') as f:
    c = f.read()

# Fix lwl (case 34)
old_lwl = 'case 34: { const a = (R[rs] + si) >>> 0, al = a & ~3, bo = a & 3, mv = r32(al); R[rt] = bo === 0 ? mv : bo === 1 ? ((mv & 0xFFFFFF00) | (R[rt] & 0xFF)) >>> 0 : bo === 2 ? ((mv & 0xFFFF0000) | (R[rt] & 0xFFFF)) >>> 0 : ((mv & 0xFF000000) | (R[rt] & 0x00FFFFFF)) >>> 0; break; }'
new_lwl = 'case 34: { const a = (R[rs] + si) >>> 0, al = a & ~3, bo = a & 3, mv = r32(al); R[rt] = bo === 3 ? mv : bo === 2 ? ((mv & 0xFFFFFF00) | (R[rt] & 0x000000FF)) >>> 0 : bo === 1 ? ((mv & 0xFFFF0000) | (R[rt] & 0x0000FFFF)) >>> 0 : ((mv & 0xFF000000) | (R[rt] & 0x00FFFFFF)) >>> 0; break; }'

# Fix swl (case 42) 
old_swl = 'case 42: { const a = (R[rs] + si) >>> 0, al = a & ~3, bo = a & 3, old = r32(al), v = R[rt]; w32(al, bo === 0 ? v : bo === 1 ? ((v & 0xFFFFFF00) | (old & 0xFF)) >>> 0 : bo === 2 ? ((v & 0xFFFF0000) | (old & 0xFFFF)) >>> 0 : ((v & 0xFF000000) | (old & 0x00FFFFFF)) >>> 0); break; }'
new_swl = 'case 42: { const a = (R[rs] + si) >>> 0, al = a & ~3, bo = a & 3, old = r32(al), v = R[rt]; w32(al, bo === 3 ? v : bo === 2 ? ((old & 0xFF000000) | (v & 0x00FFFFFF)) >>> 0 : bo === 1 ? ((old & 0xFFFF0000) | (v & 0x0000FFFF)) >>> 0 : ((old & 0xFFFFFF00) | (v & 0x000000FF)) >>> 0); break; }'

# Fix swr (case 46)
old_swr = 'case 46: { const a = (R[rs] + si) >>> 0, al = a & ~3, bo = a & 3, old = r32(al), v = R[rt]; w32(al, bo === 3 ? v : bo === 2 ? ((old & 0xFF000000) | (v & 0x00FFFFFF)) >>> 0 : bo === 1 ? ((old & 0xFFFF0000) | (v & 0x0000FFFF)) >>> 0 : ((old & 0xFFFFFF00) | (v & 0x000000FF)) >>> 0); break; }'
new_swr = 'case 46: { const a = (R[rs] + si) >>> 0, al = a & ~3, bo = a & 3, old = r32(al), v = R[rt]; w32(al, bo === 0 ? ((v & 0xFF000000) | (old & 0x00FFFFFF)) >>> 0 : bo === 1 ? ((v & 0xFFFF0000) | (old & 0x0000FFFF)) >>> 0 : bo === 2 ? ((v & 0xFFFFFF00) | (old & 0x000000FF)) >>> 0 : v); break; }'

for label, old, new in [('lwl', old_lwl, new_lwl), ('swl', old_swl, new_swl), ('swr', old_swr, new_swr)]:
    if old in c:
        c = c.replace(old, new)
        print(f'Fixed {label}')
    else:
        print(f'NOT FOUND: {label}')

with open('/app/vm.js', 'w') as f:
    f.write(c)
print('Done')
PYEOF
",
      "duration": 0.5
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "node -c /app/vm.js && echo 'Syntax OK'
",
      "duration": 0.5
    }
  ]
}
